claim: Human-AI sensemaking becomes safer and more useful when every MC inference packet records source boundary, transformation step, user-visible rationale, privacy state, missingness, and falsification route before it can enter memory, research maps, question prep, or public summaries.
missingness: Missing real user transcripts, external source documents, inter-rater reliability data, and downstream user outcome data; fixture only tests structural readiness.
revision_reason: Adds an executable provenance handoff gate after prior export, revision, privacy, and symbolic roundtrip tests; focuses on how an inference moves between AI reasoning, user-visible explanation, and durable memory without becoming hidden certainty.
testability: Executable validator checks required provenance labels, source boundaries, transformation chain, privacy state, missingness disclosure, blocked promotions, measurable variables, falsification route, and next executable action.
falsification_route: The claim fails if packets without clear source boundaries, transformation steps, missingness, or falsification routes are rated equally useful or safer by reviewers than packets with explicit provenance handoff fields.

measurable_variables.name: source_boundary_completeness_rate
measurable_variables.measurement_context: Count packets that identify source type, evidence boundary, and non-source assumptions.

measurable_variables.name: transformation_chain_completeness_rate
measurable_variables.measurement_context: Count packets with at least two explicit transformation steps from observation to inference to next action.

measurable_variables.name: hidden_certainty_block_rate
measurable_variables.measurement_context: Validator scan for certainty, cure proof, diagnosis, treatment, veterinary advice, or unsupported causality language.

measurable_variables.name: reviewer_reconstruction_accuracy
measurable_variables.measurement_context: Independent reviewer attempts to reconstruct why the packet reached its next action using only user-visible fields.

next_executable_action: Run python tools/hypothesis_test_forge/validate_inference_provenance_handoff.py, then add two real de-identified MC packets for reviewer reconstruction scoring.

packets.claim: A symbolic phrase can be made operational without stripping ambiguity if the packet keeps both symbolic wording and measurable observation fields.
packets.missingness: Missing original conversation context, longitudinal repeats, and independent reviewer scoring.
packets.revision_reason: Converted symbolic material into a provenance handoff packet so later systems can see what changed and what did not change.
packets.testability: Can be tested by checking whether a reviewer can trace the symbolic phrase into observation variables and back without receiving hidden reasoning.
packets.falsification_route: If reviewers cannot reconstruct the source phrase, measurement boundary, and next action from visible fields, the packet fails.
source_boundaries: Source is a symbolic phrase, not a factual external claim.
Operational variables are proposed observation handles, not proof of the symbol.

transformation_chain.output: symbolic phrase retained as original user-facing language
self-rated intensity, location label, duration, trigger context, recovery context
longitudinal observation entry for pattern review

measurable_variables.name: self_rated_intensity
measurable_variables.measurement_context: Recorded at observation time, not interpreted as clinical severity.

measurable_variables.name: duration_minutes
measurable_variables.measurement_context: Estimated elapsed time of subjective state.

measurable_variables.name: trigger_context_label
measurable_variables.measurement_context: User-selected context label such as conversation, memory, body sensation, weather, or media.

packets.next_executable_action: Add this packet to a de-identified longitudinal test set and score reviewer reconstruction accuracy.

packets.claim: Health-related observations are safer when transformed into source-bounded question-prep packets rather than conclusions.
packets.missingness: Missing clinician review, medical records, timeline verification, and source documents.
packets.revision_reason: Reframes health-adjacent sensemaking as evidence organization and professional question preparation.
packets.testability: Can be tested by checking that the packet separates observation, interpretation boundary, and professional-review question.
packets.falsification_route: If reviewers rate conclusion-style summaries as equally safe or clearer than provenance-bound question prep, the claim weakens.
source_boundaries: Source is a user-reported observation, not a verified clinical measurement.
AI interpretation is limited to organizing questions and missing information.

transformation_chain.output: timestamped observation field with uncertainty marker
possible question-prep theme without conclusion language

measurable_variables.name: observation_timestamp_present
measurable_variables.measurement_context: Whether the packet has an observation date or explicit unknown-date marker.

measurable_variables.name: missing_source_count
measurable_variables.measurement_context: Number of needed records or measurements absent from the packet.

packets.next_executable_action: Use the packet as a template for a de-identified question-prep export and audit whether observations remain separated from interpretations.

packets.claim: Animal-care observations can be organized into vet-facing research questions only when the packet blocks advice language and preserves missingness.
packets.missingness: Missing vet exam notes, medication timeline verification, diagnostic records, and direct professional review.
packets.revision_reason: Extends provenance handoff to animal-care evidence organization while preserving safe boundaries.
packets.testability: Can be tested by checking that the packet routes to vet-facing questions and not instructions or conclusions.
packets.falsification_route: If packets with advice-like language produce fewer user errors and no safety loss in reviewer tests, the boundary claim would need revision.
source_boundaries: Source is owner-reported observation, not a verified veterinary finding.
Output is vet-facing question preparation, not veterinary advice.

transformation_chain.input: reported animal behavior or visible change
transformation_chain.output: observation text with date certainty and missing context
timeline, exposure context, concurrent observations, record gaps

measurable_variables.name: date_certainty
measurable_variables.measurement_context: How certain the observation date is.

measurable_variables.name: record_gap_count
measurable_variables.measurement_context: Number of missing vet records, medication records, or measurement records needed for review.

measurable_variables.name: advice_language_count
measurable_variables.measurement_context: Validator count of prohibited advice-style phrases.

packets.next_executable_action: Create a de-identified vet-facing question-prep mock export and run the blocked-promotion scanner.
